title: nyssa sylvatica var. ursina
intro: Nyssa sylvatica var. ursina, also known as the American black tupelo, is a deciduous tree native to the eastern United States. This tree is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nyssa sylvatica var. ursina include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a valued herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Nyssa sylvatica var. ursina can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
